series_metadata.series_title: News Releases, Media Advisories, Agency Updates and Announcements
series_metadata.series_description: Files created to manage news releases, media advisories, event announcements and agency updates Files may include: E-mail distribution lists, e-mail confirmations, return notices, statistical data, address information, supporting documentation and any additional record generated similarly.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Maintain for three (3) state fiscal years following the year issued. Review by State Archives for historical value before disposal. Destroy when deemed of no value by the agency and State Archives. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain for three (3) state fiscal years following the year issued. Review by State Archives for historical value before disposal. Destroy when deemed of no value by the agency and State Archives. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
